name: Mail Framework Implementation
description: Complete Mail and Communication framework implementation workflow: analyze requirements, configure thread/activity behavior, validate templates and gateway, generate security, and verify.

steps.name: Analyze Requirements
steps.description: Gather mail requirements: chatter usage, activities, email templates, gateway aliases, notifications, bounce/blacklist, discuss channels.

steps.name: Configure mail.thread
steps.description: Add mail.thread (and mail.thread.blacklist if needed) to models, define tracked fields, default recipients, and auto-subscribe rules.

steps.name: Configure Activities
steps.description: Add mail.activity.mixin to models, create activity types/plans, and implement activity_schedule/activity_feedback hooks.

steps.name: Design Email Templates
steps.description: Create QWeb mail.template records with subjects, bodies, recipients, attachments, and layout inheritance.

steps.name: Setup Mail Gateway
steps.description: Configure catchall/bounce aliases, mail.alias records, inbound routing, and message_new/message_update logic.

steps.name: Validate Templates
steps.description: Validate templates for recipients, subject, body placeholders, and rendering readiness.

steps.name: Security & Testing
steps.description: Define ACLs, record rules for mail.message/notification/activity, and write tests for message_post, follower subscription, and activity scheduling.
